channel.title: Configure Displays doesn't keep modified settings
channel.description:
Hi there,
Every time Kicksecure (as Host or VM in KVM) reboots, the display settings I changed manually have disappeared.
How to keep my personalized choices and have them by default?

item.title: Configure Displays doesn't keep modified settings
item.dc:creator: Patrick
item.description:
Has been released. Documentation here: Display Configuration

Read full topic
item.source: Configure Displays doesn't keep modified settings

item.title: Configure Displays doesn't keep modified settings
item.dc:creator: cookie.monster
item.description:
This is very much appreciated!

Read full topic
item.source: Configure Displays doesn't keep modified settings

item.title: Configure Displays doesn't keep modified settings
item.dc:creator: Patrick
item.description:
Version 18.1.3.9 and above will come with usability improvements.

kanshi will be reachable via start menu and System Maintenance Panel.

Developer information:

desktop-config-dist new files:

  • /usr/libexec/desktop-config-dist/open-kanshi-config
  • /usr/libexec/desktop-config-dist/restart-kanshi
  • /usr/lib/systemd/user/kanshi.service
  • /usr/share/applications/restart-kanshi.desktop
  • /usr/share/applications/open-kanshi-config.desktop
  • /usr/share/desktop-config-dist/kanshi-config-template

Read full topic
item.source: Configure Displays doesn't keep modified settings

item.title: Configure Displays doesn't keep modified settings
item.dc:creator: cookie.monster
item.description:
I’ll have a look to it, need to find configuration file template first

Read full topic
item.source: Configure Displays doesn't keep modified settings

item.title: Configure Displays doesn't keep modified settings
item.dc:creator: arraybolt3
item.description:
wdisplays is unfortunately not able to make persistent display changes, and there wasn’t a better alternative available. If you are OK with writing configuration files to declare how your displays should be set up, kanshi might work.

Read full topic
item.source: Configure Displays doesn't keep modified settings

item.title: Configure Displays doesn't keep modified settings
item.dc:creator: cookie.monster
item.description:
Very well, will look for more then

Read full topic
item.source: Configure Displays doesn't keep modified settings

item.title: Configure Displays doesn't keep modified settings
item.dc:creator: Patrick
item.description:
Same as on Debian with LXQt / labwc and Wayland.

Unspecific to Kicksecure.

Kicksecure – 6 Sep 24

Potential Solutions Beyond Kicksecure!

Explore resources outside of Kicksecure to address unspecific questions or issues.

Can probably be resolved as per:

Kicksecure – 18 May 25

Self Support First Policy for Kicksecure

Definition of the Self Support First Policy for Kicksecure

This will probably get documented in a few days.

Read full topic
